scripts.dev:web:clean: cd apps/web && rm -rf .next && npm run dev
scripts.dev:clean: rm -rf apps/web/.next apps/web/.next-dev apps/web/.next-build apps/api/dist packages/is-domain/dist
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix apps/web && npm run lint --prefix apps/api
scripts.lint:fix: cd apps/web && npx next lint --fix && cd ../api && npx eslint "src/**/*.ts" --fix --max-warnings=0
